Infanta doña BLANCA de Navarra (-12/14 Mar 1229).  The Nobiliario of Pedro Conde de Barcelos names "D. Berenguel …

sourceList.title: Blanche De Navarre, "Find A Grave Index"

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - THIBAUT de Champagne m (1 Jul 1199) Infanta doña BLANCA de Navarra, daughter of don SANCHO VI "el Sabio" King of Navarre & his wife Infanta doña Sancha de Castilla (-12/14 Mar 1229).

parent.name: Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon

children.name: Thibaut I de Navarre Roi de Navarre

zh.lifeSummary: 當Blanche de Navarre於1170年出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納時，她的父親Rey Sancho VI de Navarra38歲，母親Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon33歲。她於1199年7月1日與Thibaut III de Champagne在法國崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1229年3月13日在她的家鄉享年59歲，埋葬在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Blanche de Navarre于1170年出生在西班牙納法洛亞易盧納时，她的父亲Rey Sancho VI de Navarra38岁，母亲Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon33岁。她于1199年7月1日与Thibaut III de Champagne在法国崔艾-吉洛易哈特雷斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1229年3月13日在她的家乡享年59岁，埋葬在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Navarre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Jacques, Anatole, Angelle, Camille, Marcelle.
French: habitational name from Navarre (see   Navarra  ).

variants.name: Navarra
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Sal, Edgardo, Guido, Santo, Vito, Angelo, Annamarie, Antonio, Benedicto, Camillo, Dante, Emilio, Fausto, Gaetano, Giuseppe, Mario, Romulo, Sergio.  Spanish Agustin, Herlinda, Manuel, Solita.

Spanish, Portuguese, Italian, and Jewish (Sephardic): habitational name from Navarre (Castilian Navarra, Basque Nafarroa, French Navarre), a largely Basque-speaking region now divided between Spain and France, but in the Middle Ages an independent Basque kingdom. The name of the region derives from Basque naba ‘plain next to mountains’. Compare Navarre .

nameMeanings.name: Blanche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname for a blonde, from blanche, feminine of Old French blanc ‘white’ (of Germanic origin). It came to be associated with the notion of whiteness as indicating purity, and was introduced into England as a given name by the Normans. A pale complexion combined with light hair was long an ideal of beauty in Europe (compare Modern English fair, which at first meant ‘beautiful’ and then, from the 16th century, ‘light in colouring’).

historicEvents.description: The Christian territory controlled the Kingdoms of Aragon, Navarre, and Castile.

en.lifeSummary: When Blanche de Navarre was born in 1170, in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spain, her father, Rey Sancho VI de Navarra, was 38 and her mother, Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon, was 33. She married Thibaut III de Champagne on 1 July 1199, in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died on 13 March 1229, in her hometown, at the age of 59, and was buried in Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Blanche de Navarre est née en 1170, à Iruña, Nafarroa, Espagne, son père, Rey Sancho VI de Navarra, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon, avait 33 ans. Elle a épousé Thibaut III de Champagne le 1 juillet 1199, à Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 13 mars 1229, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Blanche de Navarre 1170 in Iruña, Nafarroa, Spanien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Rey Sancho VI de Navarra 38 und ihre Mutter Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon 33. Sie hat am 1. Juli 1199 in Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Frankreich Thibaut III de Champagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 13. März 1229 im Alter von 59 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Navarre è nata il nel 1170 nel Iruña, Nafarroa, Spagna, sua padre, Rey Sancho VI de Navarra, aveva 38 anni e sua madre, Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon, aveva 33 anni. Lei sposato Thibaut III de Champagne il 1 luglio 1199, nel Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 13 marzo 1229, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Blanche de Navarreが1170年にスペインナファロアイルnアで生まれた時，父Rey Sancho VI de Navarraは38歳，母Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leonは33歳であった。1199年7月1日にフランスセントアエウレ-エト-ロイルチャートレスでThibaut III de Champagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1229年3月13日に故郷で59歳で死去し，フランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Blanche de Navarre(이)가 1170년 스페인 나파로 이루n아에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Rey Sancho VI de Navarra(은)는 38세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon(은)는 33세였다. 그녀는 1199년 7월 1일 프랑스 세트르 우레-트-로이르 처트레스에서 Thibaut III de Champagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1229년 3월 13일 그녀의 고향에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Blanche de Navarre nasceu em 1170, em Iruña, Nafarroa, Espanha, seu pai, Rey Sancho VI de Navarra, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon, tinha 33 anos. Ela casou-se com Thibaut III de Champagne em 1 de julho de 1199, em Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 13 de março de 1229, em sua cidade natal, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Blanche de Navarre родилась в 1170 г. в местности ируnа, нафарроа, Испания, её отцу по имени Rey Sancho VI de Navarra было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon, 33. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thibaut III de Champagne 1 июля 1199 г. в местности чартресь, эуре-ет-лоир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла 13 марта 1229 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Blanche de Navarre nació en 1170, en Pamplona, Navarra, España, su papá, Rey Sancho VI de Navarra, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Princesa Sancha De Castilla y Leon, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Thibaut III de Champagne el 1 de julio de 1199, en Chartres, Eure-et-Loir, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1229, en su pueblo, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia.
